name: rest-api-collector
description: Collects data from REST APIs with configurable authentication, headers, and polling interval.
author: vessel-core

url.title: API URL
url.description: The full URL of the REST API endpoint to collect data from.

method.title: HTTP Method
method.description: HTTP method to use for the request.

headers.title: HTTP Headers
headers.description: Additional HTTP headers to include in the request.

auth_token.title: Auth Token / API Key
auth_token.description: Bearer token, Base64-encoded basic credentials, or API key value.

api_key_header.title: API Key Header Name
api_key_header.description: Header name for API key authentication (e.g., X-API-Key).

interval.title: Poll Interval
interval.description: How often to poll the API (e.g., '5m', '1h', '30s'). Leave empty for one-shot.

records_path.title: Records JSON Path
records_path.description: Dot-notation path to extract records array from response (e.g., 'data.items'). Leave empty if response is the records array.

interval.ui:help: Leave empty for one-shot execution. Examples: 30s, 5m, 1h

records_path.ui:help: Dot-notation path to extract records from the JSON response

records.description: Collected records from the API response.
